stem: A public health study surveys 1000 residents surveyed and observes 183 positive outcomes out of 1000 (18.3%). Estimate the true vaccination coverage and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.183. Wilson 95% CI: [0.1603, 0.2082]. Point estimate: 0.1842.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
